Right now, I'm a bit…
Can we talk about it later?

Honestly, I'm already swamped with things
with Kobayakawa and this matter…

If you give me that look, I can't just say no.
Alright, leave it to me!

Yeah.
Let me show you I'm reliable.

I've lived twice as long as you, you know.
I'm a man's man who's experienced both sour and sweet!

Hey, Shinpei.
You're being too modest--

Alright, whatever it is, no problem.
Leave it to me and you'll be fine.

If it's up to me,
any problem will be solved right away!
